title.en: This kind of thing, the mysterious woman natura...

content.en:
As a result of comprehending the rules of the thirteen dimensions, his current strength is far greater than in the past.

Therefore, the ordinary Yuanxia female beast is not his opponent at all, only a very small number of Yuanxia female beasts have survived for too long and are relatively strong in combat power, and they can fight with him.

After a while.

Ye Tian collected the Yuanxia mother liquor from these eight places, and then came to the depths of the spell spirit gold vein again, and handed over these Yuanxia mother liquids to the mysterious woman, but he still left half of it, and the mysterious woman would not touch half of his Yuanxia mother liquid, otherwise it would definitely make Ye Tian's heart cold.

This kind of thing, the mysterious woman naturally knows not to do.

With these Yuanxia mother liquor, the mysterious woman used it again to repair her body damage.

And Ye Tian continued to comprehend the Gray Mist Heavenly Dao Stone, and now the effect of the Gray Mist Heavenly Dao Stone on him has weakened, but he can still mention "Three One Three" to ascend to his dimensional rule realm.

And just like that, another long time passed.

Fourteen Dimensional Rules!

Fifteen Dimensional Rules!

It wasn't until Ye Tian comprehended the rules of the sixteen dimensions that the mysterious woman asked him to collect Yuanxia Mother Liquid again, and Ye Tian could only collect it again.

And the realm of dimensional rules is high, and the difficulty of his creation of supreme mastery is much lower.

Now, he had once again created a Six Realms Supreme Peerless Void Technique, which was a speed-type Six Realms Supreme Void Technique, making his strength even stronger.

Holding two supreme masters of the Six Realms, and comprehending the rules of the fifteen dimensions, how strong his strength is, except for the most demonic piece of the Sixth Realm, he is invincible in the Sixth Realm.

"Yuanmuhe has only found three Yuanxia mother liquor, according to this, it is estimated that you will not get too much Yuanxia mother liquor, and if you want to re-conceive it, it will take a long time!"

Ye Tian felt that he had to go to two other places in the later stage, where there were a lot of Yuanxia mother liquor, which was far from being comparable to Yuanmu River.

But the danger in those two places is too great, and there is a high probability that he will fall in the past.

"When the time comes, I have to talk to that mysterious woman, let me understand the Gray Mist Heavenly Dao Stone more, and when the strength is strong, I will collect Yuanxia Mother Liquid for her!"

Ye Tian said.

......

Soon.

Ye Tian snatched the Yuanxia mother liquor from these three places, sent it to the Spell Spirit Gold Vein, and handed it to the mysterious woman, and this time the amount was too small, he handed it all over to her, and said that he wanted to understand for a while longer.

After thinking about it, the mysterious woman said, "Okay, then you can understand for a while longer!"

"Thank you, senior!"

Ye Tian went to the Gray Mist Heavenly Dao Stone here to continue to comprehend the rules of the dimension.

Before I knew it, sixty years had passed.

"Twenty-six dimensional rules!"

Ye Tian was very excited.

In just sixty years of comprehension, he had comprehended the rules of the twenty-six dimensions, and now his strength was terrifying.

However, after reaching this level, he found himself in a bottleneck, not that the Gray Mist Heavenly Dao Stone was useless, but that there was a bottleneck in the darkness that prevented him from comprehending the rules of the twenty-seven dimensions.

Now, although the mysterious woman's face is still pale, her breath has stabilized a lot, obviously her injuries have recovered a little, and her mood is much better.

"Little guy, the reason why you fell into a bottleneck is entirely because you have fallen into the bottleneck of the rule chain, there are various bottlenecks in the origin of dimensional rules, and these bottlenecks are bound by an invisible chain. "

"In the Upper Domain, this kind of knowledge has been blocked, and the method of breakthrough has also been blocked, only the forces where the Eighth Realm is located know this secret, and the ordinary forces don't know it at all, they only think it's a bottleneck. It is very difficult to break this bottleneck, for example, some sixth realms encounter this kind of rule chain bottleneck, and they can only impact the seventh realm, once they break through to the seventh realm, the bottleneck will also be crushed, and you can comprehend the dimensional rules of the higher realm. "

"Similarly, the same is true in the eighth realm, if you encounter a bottleneck, you can only break through the bottleneck by breaking through the eighth realm. "

"Another way is to rely on the endless long years to wear out this bottleneck little by little, but the time it takes is far longer than you think. Now, in the Upper Domain, countless Seventh Realm dimensional rules have fallen into a bottleneck, and they have not been able to break through 0....."

Listening to the mysterious woman's explanation, Ye Tian asked suspiciously: "Why is there such a bottleneck, it feels a little unreasonable!"

"As for why, I don't know very well, it is said that a certain invincible existence of the Ninth Realm did something to put a treasure in the origin of the dimensional rules, suppressing the origin of the dimensional rules, thus causing this situation. "

The mysterious woman really doesn't know the reason, and this is also a taboo in the upper domain.

However, she knew the solution.

"If you want to break this bottleneck, if you break through in a short time, there are two ways I know, the first way is to use some special treasures, but I don't have a few treasures, you can't get them, then there is only one way left, create your own Six Realms Supreme Absolute Learning, once you comprehend it, you will perceive the existence of the mysterious chain bottleneck, and then use the Six Realms Supreme Absolute Technique to cross the dimensional void, slash at the chain, cut it off, and break the bottleneck, and you can continue to comprehend the dimensional rules. "

The mysterious woman said.

"Thank you for your advice!"

Ye Tianming came to his senses.

Then, his next goal was to create a supreme mastery of the Six Realms, otherwise, he would not be able to progress for the time being, unless he immediately attacked the Seventh Realm.

But if he still wants to break through to the seventh realm in the most perfect way, 5.7 then he must comprehend the rules of the thirty-six dimensions.

Therefore, he still had to create his own Six Realms Supreme Learning.

......

After coming out of the Spell Spirit Gold Vein, except for Ye Tian to let one copy body continue to cruise the Yuanmu River, the other copy bodies were all working hard to create and study the Six Realms Supreme Peerless Sect.

Fortunately, he had obtained the inheritance of the Six Realms Supreme Absolute Learning, so it was much less difficult to create his own Six Realms Supreme Absolute Learning.

In addition, his current dimensional rule realm is extremely high, which increases hope.

In the days that followed, with the help of multi-dimensional wisdom light and the Silver Xuan Illustrated Book, he continued to analyze and create the Six Realms Supreme Learning.

In this way, one domain yuan after another years passed.

It was not until the one hundred and seventh years later.

On this day, Ye Tian finally created his first Six Realms Supreme Peerless Sect.
